---
title: "Special Lectures - 특강"
editor: visual
---

# Topics

I usually give special lectures on the following topics (both in English and Korean):

-   Korean public diplomacy

-   Public diplomacy: Its history and evolution

-   American public diplomacy in the 21st Century

-   Korean middle power diplomacy

-   Korea's status-seeking in a changing world order

-   The intersection of public diplomacy and global governance

-   Non-state actors in public diplomacy

-   People-to-people diplomacy

-   Inter-Korean people-to-people exchanges

-   Social policies for peaceful coexistence in Korea

# Clips

[Here is my interview with Joseph Nye for Korea Foundation's 3rd Public Diplomacy Week.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5oG8jvd2N4E&list=PLV–mO3HDJuXS7rC0D3ZGHe5TlxCWPd0n&index=9)

[This is a lecture I recorded for Korea Foundation on public diplomacy of various countries (in Korean).](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dwZ5bwfx2cU&list=PLV–mO3HDJuXS7rC0D3ZGHe5TlxCWPd0n&index=8)

I will add more later.

# Contact - 연락

You can contact me via [email](mailto:ayhan@ewha.ac.kr) for special lecture inquiries.

강의 의뢰는 [이메일로](mailto:ayhan@ewha.ac.kr) 연락하시기를 바랍니다.
